content:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gwJCR1TSVzjln7Li96aEE0-_rA3Brfthei7CqnQkr-Y/edit?usp=sharing

**Contents:
- Introduction, Character and Card Rundown
- Combo and Playstyle Guide
- Covenant Info
- Caro Ultra Team Compositions
- All Good Wheels of Destiny I've Used
- Arc 1 and 2 Relic Tier List Plus Notes**
This is a detailed English language guide on how to understand, build and play Uvhash in the Caro Ultra realm combination in Arc 1, and especially in Arc 2. I hope anyone who's interested in Uvhash as a potential lategame damage dealer (that is also a standard banner character) will be helped by this guide.

For the time being I only focused on the Caro Ultra realm as I have not experienced nor experimented enough with Uvhash in Caro Chaos or Caro Aequor to give sufficiently detailed tips on their character synergies. I would like to expand on this in the future as well as write specific requested tips for particular hard bosses.

Thanks to anyone who reads. <:evil:1356083443020337152>
